title:
Whether MGNREGS has affected agricultural
wage rate in Andhra Pradesh State of India?
A panel modeling across 23 districts from 2000 to 2011
abstract:
The impact of Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
on agricultural labour supply and agricultural wage rate is a popular policy concern in India.
The available literature on the issue provides mixed findings which motivated the authors to carry out this study.
